stories.title: Kiper's grades for all 32 NFL draft classes: Why the Cowboys and Jets aced their picks
stories.summary: Mel Kiper Jr. evaluates the entire 2026 NFL draft, from the good (Cowboys, Jets) to the very questionable (Rams). See all 32 teams' grades.

stories.title: The NFL draft is over ... let's overreact: Will the Cardinals and Rams regret their picks?
stories.summary: It's time to weigh in on the biggest overreactions of NFL draft weekend, from Jeremiyah Love's fit to the Eagles' position in the NFC East.

stories.title: Wolves lose Edwards, DiVincenzo in Game 4 win
stories.summary: Wolves star Anthony Edwards will undergo an MRI after leaving Saturday's Game 4 win with an apparent hyperextension of his left knee, and sources told ESPN that Donte DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon.

stories.title: McDaniels' late layup irks Jokic in Nuggets' loss
stories.summary: Jaden McDaniels' late layup in Minnesota's 112-96 Game 4 home victory over Denver incited a skirmish with Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets on Saturday night, a scrum that led to ejections on a night when the Timberwolves secured a 3-1 series lead.

stories.title: Red Sox fire Cora amid coaching staff shake-up
stories.summary: The Red Sox fired manager Alex Cora and several other coaches after a disappointing 10-17 start to the season.
